# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository is currently a minimal outline for Samsung Galaxy A17 devices.

## What this repository contains
- `README.md`: a short outline describing the repository scope.

## What Copilot should know
- There are no source files, build scripts, or test configuration present.
- The repository is currently a high-level outline rather than a working codebase.
- Any added content should keep the repository focused on Samsung Galaxy A17 device support.

## How to help
- When asked to add features, create files and documentation that align with Samsung Galaxy A17 support.
- Prefer concise, structured changes over broad rewrites.
- If new code or scripts are added, also add supporting documentation for build and test commands.

## If you are uncertain
- Ask the user for clarifying details before making substantive changes.
- Confirm the expected platform, language, or toolchain before generating infrastructure or device-specific code.

## Recommended prompts
- "Add a development plan for Samsung Galaxy A17 device support in this repository." 
- "Create a project structure for Android device configuration targeting Samsung Galaxy A17." 
- "Document the next steps for expanding this repository into a Samsung device support project."
